name: perps-litvm-prediction-keeper
description: Standalone, isolated keeper for the parimutuel prediction market on LitVM (chain 4441). Drives the three permissionless entrypoints — replenish() (board maintenance), observe() (TWAP sampling), settle() (resolution). Reads DIA prices on-chain via adapters, so it needs NO RedStone payload. Separate process, separate key, separate Railway service from the perp keeper.
